content:
Through the eyes of the Creator, countless Keepers from multiple worlds stand side by side.

For the colleagues crossing millions of dimensions, fighting alongside you at this very moment, do the Keepers have any words they want to convey?

At this critical moment of battle, the boundaries of dimensions have been opened. Fragments of the Creator, offer guidance to your alternate world line self. ✒️

**【Event Rules】**
From 11/30 09:00 to 12/12 09:00 [UTC+8], Keepers can fill out their messages to other Keepers in the questionnaire link below.
We welcome Keepers to share their experiences - whether it's mutual help throughout the year in Morimens, stories and feelings experienced in the Mythag campus, or encouragements during the decisive battle.
After 09:00 on 12/7, the Devs will start to collect all Keeper messages and randomly deliver them to another participant through in-game mail. (Each Keeper who leaves a message will receive a message from another Keeper.)

**【Submission Link】**
https://wj.sialiagames.com.tw/p/zt5z6VL6

**【Event Rewards】**
Each Keeper who successfully submits will receive: Silver Core x 200, Emergency Cognitive Unit x 3 (Will be sent along with the received message.)
Additionally, 50 lucky Keepers will be randomly selected from all participants to receive the "Mythag Anniversary Commemorative Peripheral Gift Box".
(The "Mythag Anniversary Commemorative Peripheral Gift Box" includes postcards, laser tickets, holographic cards, stickers, metal bookmarks, and other peripheral items, currently still in production.)

**【Important Notes】**
1. One Keeper ID is limited to one participation, with no rewards for repeated entries.
2. Message content must not involve politics, bloody violence, vulgar pornography, racial discrimination, or infringe on third-party rights. Such content will be deleted and disqualify the participant from winning.
3. After the winner list is announced, the official will notify winners through in-game mail. Do not trust any prize invitation from sources other than in-game mail to avoid being scammed.
4. Winners must contact the school staff within 7 days after the winner list is announced for subsequent prize collection procedures. Failure to complete procedures will be considered as forfeiting the prize.
5. Physical prizes will be sent within 50 working days after the reporting deadline. Keepers are asked to be patient.
6. Prizes will be provided and handled by the official. Regions outside Taiwan, Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, and Malaysia must bear their own shipping costs. Once the gift is sent, the company is not responsible for loss, damage, customs clearance delays, or incorrect delivery information.
7. The organizer will assist in withholding and paying taxes and remittance fees. Winners are requested to cooperate in providing relevant information. Refusal will be considered as forfeiting the prize; other unspecified matters will be handled according to tax regulations.
8. Morimens official reserves the final interpretation rights for this event.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

Some instructions:
After opening the link, enter your UID in the first input box, and then enter what you want to say in the second input box

Link: https://wj.sialiagames.com.tw/p/zt5z6VL6

The event will end in <t:1733965201:R>

Additionally, blessing messages will be preferentially distributed to Keepers using the same language.
